name: my-harness-generator
description: Parallel multi-agent harness for Claude Code + Codex CLI. /my-harness-init bootstraps a fresh project from a structured interview; /my-harness-adopt is idempotent and handles both initial adoption of an existing git repo (history preserved) and ongoing refresh after plugin upgrades. /harness-team-lead drives up to 4 lanes in parallel with per-lane resource gating; each lane role (analyst / engineer / e2e-reviewer / reviewer) can individually delegate to Codex via codex-ask.sh or codex-exec.sh.

plugins.name: my-harness
plugins.description: Harness generator core. /my-harness-init (fresh-project interview + bootstrap), /my-harness-adopt (idempotent — initial adoption of an existing repo on first run, ongoing refresh on subsequent runs), /harness-team-lead (4-lane parallel orchestrator). Four lane roles — analyst / engineer / e2e-reviewer / reviewer — each individually delegable to Codex. One rule set (rules/*.md) shared across Claude / Codex / Cursor / Aider via dev/CLAUDE.md + dev/AGENTS.md. Live observability + watchdog auto-intervention via scripts/monitor-agents.sh. Requires CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1.
